trending_videos.title: 『チェンソーマン 刺客篇』ティザーPV②／Chainsaw Man –  Assassins Arc Official Trailer 2
trending_videos.description:

『チェンソーマン 刺客篇』ティザーPV②
　　　　　　　　　　             　◤◤◤◤

【STAFF】
原作：藤本タツキ（集英社ジャンプコミックス刊）

悪魔デザイン：押山清高
衣装デザイン：山本彩／中村七左
美術監督：竹田悠介／宗政拓
色彩設計：中野尚美 
カラースクリプト：Chavoom
3DCGディレクター：山内智史／玉井真広　　
撮影監督：伊藤哲平
編集：吉武将人
音響監督：名倉靖
制作：MAPPA　

【CAST】
デンジ：戸谷菊之介

ビーム：花江夏樹
暴力の魔人：内田夕夜
蜘蛛の悪魔：後藤沙緒里

■アニメ『チェンソーマン』公式サイト：https://chainsawman.dog/
■公式X：@CHAINSAWMAN_PR（https://twitter.com/ CHAINSAWMAN_PR）

trending_videos.title: Fall asleep while I build a zoo (Part 2)
trending_videos.description:
Fall asleep while I play PLANET ZOO (PART 2) - Back for more, building a zoo with calm commentary and chill life chats and advice! Episode 49 of my gaming ASMR series to help you sleep, relaxing gameplay & chill commentary with MadMorph, perfect for study, background noise, relaxation, and sleep. 

Check out the podcast below, on Spotify and everywhere you get podcasts. 

►  My PODCAST for sleep: https://downtosleeppodcast.com

trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: Zenless Zone Zero v3.1: Official Void Hunter Agent Remielle Trailer
trending_videos.description: Get an early look at the Void Hunter Agent Remielle in Zenless Zone Zero Version 3.1! This preview of in-development content showcases Remielle's distinctive visual design, signature moves, and in-game combat style. Remielle will make her official debut as a brand-new S-rank Agent in the Zenless Zone Zero's Anniversary update, Version 3.1.

anime: Collaborations between MAPPA CHANNEL and gaming channels to promote anime-related games.
gaming: Partnerships between IGN and film studios for cross-promotional content on superhero games and films.

untappedContent: In-depth behind-the-scenes content for trailers, engaging audiences interested in production processes.
Localized content targeting non-English speaking regions, leveraging the presence of Japanese titles.
underrepresentedCategories: Expand presence in educational content related to film and game development.
